title: Personascope: Measuring how deeply LLMs adopt personas
summary: Personascope: Measuring how deeply LLMs adopt personas
whyItMatters: Benji Berczi , Kyuhee Kim , James Requeima, Sid Black, Cozmin Ududec This is work done by Benji and Kyuhee during MATS Winter 2026, mentored by Cozmin Ududec, and advised by James and Sid. Figure 1. A model can take on a persona fully in voice while not changing its behaviour at all. The x-axis (Persona-Adoption Depth, PAD) is how fully the model identifies…
